name: Dahua LPH86-ST420-S3 86" Smart Interactive Whiteboard
shortDescription: 86-inch 4K DLED display with Zero Air Gap technology, 8 physical front buttons, AI recognition of drawings, wireless screen sharing, QR code file sharing, Android/Windows dual system
description: Transform any classroom, meeting room, or collaborative space with the Dahua LPH86-ST420-S3, a premium 86-inch smart interactive display designed to elevate engagement and productivity. The 86" DLED panel with Zero Air Gap technology delivers vivid color, deep contrast, and ultra-clear 4K (3840x2160) visuals. Powered by Android 14 with a quad-core A55 processor, 8 GB RAM and 32 GB storage for smooth multitasking. Supports wireless screen sharing from multiple devices with split-screen display (up to 9 splits). Infrared touch with up to 21 touch points and ±1mm accuracy. 8 physical front buttons for quick access to functions, smooth writing experience with AI recognition of drawings, and quick file sharing by scanning a QR code with easy file encryption. Switches between Android and Windows — OPS module is optional.

name: Dahua LPH75-MC420-C-S2 75" Smart Interactive Flat Panel (For Project)
shortDescription: 75-inch 4K UHD interactive flat panel, Built-in Deephub Meeting software, 2.0-channel 40W audio, 90% NTSC High Gamut Screen, split screen, screen sharing, handwriting recognition — project variant
description: The Dahua LPH75-MC420-C-S2 (For Project) is a 75-inch 4K interactive flat panel display designed for professional project deployments. Built-in Deephub Meeting software offers online conferences and customizable support for real-time collaboration. Displays in 4K Ultra HD with 4K UI. Two built-in mid-high frequency speakers support 2.0-channel audio output with 40W total power. Produces vibrant visuals through its NTSC High Gamut Screen with wide color coverage up to 90% and accurate color reproduction of ΔE≤1.5. Features split screen and screen sharing between the whiteboard and phones, computers, tablets and more devices. Microsoft Office and other related software can be installed. Smooth writing experience through handwriting recognition, pen writing, fast writing response speed, and pen pressure recognition.

name: Dahua LPH98-MC470-P-S2 98" 4K UHD Interactive Flat Panel
shortDescription: 98-inch 4K UHD interactive flat panel, Built-in DeepHub Meeting software (1-year license), 2.1-channel 60W audio, 90% NTSC High Gamut Screen, ΔE≤1.5 color accuracy, split screen, screen sharing
description: The Dahua LPH98-MC470-P-S2 is a premium 98-inch 4K UHD interactive flat panel display engineered for large boardrooms, auditoriums, and high-end collaborative environments. Built-in DeepHub Meeting software for cloud-based online conferences with real-time collaboration (includes a one-year usage license). Displays in 4K Ultra HD with 4K UI. Two built-in mid-high frequency speakers and one low-frequency speaker support 2.1-channel audio output with 60W total power. Produces vibrant visuals through its high color coverage (90% NTSC High Gamut Screen) and accurate color reproduction (ΔE≤1.5). Features split screen and screen sharing between the whiteboard and phones, computers, tablets and more. Microsoft Office and other related software can be installed.

name: Dahua LPH98-MC470-P 98" DeepHub Pro Smart Interactive Whiteboard
shortDescription: 98-inch 4K UHD DeepHub Pro interactive whiteboard, Built-in AI 4K camera & 8-array microphone, Zero Air Gap / full lamination technology, wireless screen sharing, handwriting recognition, fingerprint lock, OPS optional
description: The Dahua LPH98-MC470-P is a 98-inch 4K UHD interactive flat panel display designed to elevate collaboration and communication in large boardrooms, lecture halls, and enterprise environments. Equipped with Zero Air Gap technology (65/75/86") and full lamination (98") for clear, vivid visuals. Built-in AI 4K camera and 8-array microphone deliver excellent quality visual and audio communication for video conferencing. Wireless screen sharing from multiple devices with an intuitive, easy-to-use system. Ultra-smooth writing experience with handwriting recognition. Quick file sharing by scanning a QR code with easy file encryption for added privacy and security. Optional OPS module with dual-system switchable between Android and Windows. Fingerprint lock for protection of user information.
